backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Rose Dating backend, implementing access control, user profiles, a follow system, and a block system with helper functions to manage blocking relationships between users.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report identifying that GroupChatPage.tsx implements the searchable DM-contact-based member selection UI for group chat settings, replacing the old principal-ID input.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of every frontend source file, describing each component's purpose and notable recent changes.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the Rose Dating PWA, setting up viewport meta tags, theme color, manifest link, app icons, and mounting the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA manifest for Rose Dating defining app name, icons (192×192 and 512×512), standalone display mode, theme colors, and shortcuts to Posts, Chats, and Users sections.
frontend/public/service-worker.js: Service worker implementing cache-first for static assets and network-first for HTML/other requests, with precaching of key assets on install, old-cache cleanup on activate, and stubs for background sync and push notifications.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that configures TanStack Router with all app routes (chats, users, posts, pay, profile, admin, etc.), sets ChatsPage as the index route, and wraps everything in QueryClient and ThemeProvider.
frontend/src/components/BottomNav.tsx: Fixed bottom navigation bar with four tabs (Users, Chats, Posts, Pay) that highlights the Chats tab as active for both '/' and '/chats*' routes.
frontend/src/components/CreateGroupChatM: A modal dialog for creating a group chat, allowing the user to set a group name, upload an avatar, and select participants from existing DM contacts.
frontend/src/components/CreateStoryModal: A modal dialog for creating a story by uploading an image or video file, or recording a video directly, then submitting it via the createStory mutation.
frontend/src/components/ExpiredMediaPlac: A presentational component that displays a placeholder UI indicating that a media item (image, video, voice, etc.) has expired after 72 hours.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main app layout component that handles authentication gating, profile setup prompts, QR code scan navigation, and renders the top/bottom nav with the routed page content.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: A button component that toggles between login and logout actions using Internet Identity, clearing the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/LoginRequiredPro: A full-screen prompt shown to unauthenticated users with branding and a login button that initiates Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/components/NotificationPane: A panel component that displays user notifications grouped by tabs (all, messages, social, system), supporting mark-as-read, mark-all-read, delete, and navigation to linked content.
frontend/src/components/ProfileLinkMessa: Renders message text with detected `/users/<principal>` patterns converted into clickable navigation links and copy-to-clipboard buttons for profile URLs.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog form that collects required profile fields (name, username, country) and optional fields (gender, birth year, bio) to create a new user profile via the `useSaveCallerUserProfile` mutation.
frontend/src/components/PWAInstallPrompt: Displays a dismissible card prompt at the bottom of the screen inviting users to install the app as a PWA, with logic to suppress the prompt if already installed or dismissed within the last 7 days.
frontend/src/components/QRCodeModal.tsx: A modal with three views (menu, show, scan) that either displays the current user's profile QR code or activates the camera to scan another user's Rose Dating QR code and navigate to their profile.
frontend/src/components/RoseGiftModal.ts: A dialog that lets a user enter an amount of Roses to gift to a named recipient, validating against minimum amount and current balance before calling the provided `onGift` callback.
frontend/src/components/SendProfileLinkD: A tabbed dialog that allows sending a profile link URL as a text message to either an existing direct conversation or a group chat, using the respective send-message mutations.
Displays a horizontal carousel of user stories grouped by author, with a dialog viewer that supports navigation between stories, marking them as viewed, and sharing to conversations or group chats.
frontend/src/components/TopNav.tsx: Renders the fixed top navigation bar with a logo, search form, QR code modal trigger, and a notification bell with unread count badge.
frontend/src/components/VideoRecorder.ts: Provides a dialog-based video recorder that accesses the camera, records video using the best supported MIME type, allows playback preview, and returns the recorded Blob via a callback.
frontend/src/components/VoiceRecorder.ts: Provides a dialog-based audio recorder that selects the best supported audio MIME type, records from the microphone, supports playback preview, and returns the recorded Blob via a callback.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, and invalidates all dependent queries whenever the actor instance changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context provider and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flows, identity persistence, and delegation validity checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profiles, posts, conversations, group chats, stories, notifications, and rose transactions. Wraps actor calls with useQuery/useMutation and handles cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet using Tailwind CSS with custom OKLCH-based CSS variables for light/dark themes and utility classes for rose-themed gradients, glows, and card styles.
frontend/src/lib/mediaExpiration.ts: Provides utility functions to check if media content has expired (72-hour window) and to calculate remaining hours until expiration, using nanosecond timestamps.
frontend/src/lib/profileLinkDetection.ts: Parses text to detect and extract ICP principal-based profile links, returning structured segments of type 'text' or 'profileLink' for rendering clickable profile references.
frontend/src/lib/profileLinks.ts: Utility functions to build absolute profile URLs from a user principal ID and to share or copy a URL using the Web Share API with clipboard fallback.
frontend/src/lib/pwa.ts: Handles PWA lifecycle including service worker registration/unregistration, install prompt deferral, custom install promotion events, and installed state detection.
frontend/src/lib/videoMime.ts: Selects the most compatible MediaRecorder MIME type by probing support, preferring MP4/H.264 and falling back to WebM, with helpers to detect iOS and warn about WebM compatibility.
frontend/src/lib/videoUploadGuidance.ts: Checks uploaded video files for incompatible formats (WebM, MKV, AVI, etc.) and returns a warning message recommending MP4 for better mobile playback.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminUserManagementPa: Admin-only page that lists all user profiles with search/filter, and provides dialogs for editing or deleting individual user accounts, restricted to the 'rosalia' admin username.
frontend/src/pages/AnalyticsPage.tsx: Admin-only analytics dashboard that displays platform statistics (messages, likes, follows, rose gifts, etc.) fetched from notification counts. Restricts access to a hardcoded admin username and shows loading skeletons while data is fetched.
frontend/src/pages/ChatsPage.tsx: Chats listing page showing stories carousel, group chats, and direct conversations with pagination, sorted by most recent message. Includes modals for creating stories and group chats.
frontend/src/pages/ConversationPage.tsx: Full direct-message conversation view supporting text, image, video, voice, and rose-gift messages with features like block/unblock, message forwarding, editing, deletion, and an enhanced video player with MIME-type handling.
frontend/src/pages/EmailSettingsPage.tsx: Settings page for managing a user's email address, with validation and profile save logic; notes that the backend does not yet have a dedicated email field.
frontend/src/pages/GroupChatPage.tsx: Group chat page with real-time messaging (text, image, video, voice), group settings management (rename, avatar, add/remove participants), and inline media players for video and audio messages.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page component (content truncated/empty in the provided source).
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailurePage.ts: A simple error page displayed when a payment fails, offering buttons to retry the payment or navigate home.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccessPage.ts: A simple confirmation page displayed after a successful payment, informing the user their premium features are active and providing a link back to the app.
frontend/src/pages/PayPage.tsx: A page for managing Rose token transactions, allowing authenticated users to buy/sell Roses, view balance and transaction history, check ICP/USD exchange rates, and browse/chat with dealers.
frontend/src/pages/PostsPage.tsx: A social feed page supporting creating, editing, deleting, liking, saving, commenting on, and gifting roses to posts, with tabs for all posts, followed users, personal posts, and saved posts.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: A page for viewing and editing the authenticated user's own profile, including avatar upload, bio, username, country, gender, and birth year, with options to delete the account.
frontend/src/pages/SearchPage.tsx: A search results page that displays users, messages, and posts matching a query string, with loading skeletons and empty-state handling.
frontend/src/pages/UserProfilePage.tsx: A public profile page for viewing another user's posts and profile, supporting follow/unfollow, block/unblock, liking, commenting, and saving posts.
frontend/src/pages/UsersPage.tsx: React page that displays a filterable, paginated list of user profiles with options to message or view each user, and handles QR code username navigation via URL search params.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with OKLCH-based design tokens, custom shadows, border radii, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for a 'Rose Dating' chat app, tracking an existing feature and a pending request to replace principal-ID-based member input in group settings with a searchable list from existing conversations.
